# Cake AI Artist

> Free AI cake designer that creates personalized birthday, anniversary, wedding and celebration cakes in 30 seconds. Generate custom cakes with any name, share them, and plan the whole party.

Cake AI Artist is an AI-powered cake design and party-planning tool. Users describe a cake (occasion, name, theme, colors) and the app generates a high-quality image of a personalized cake. Premium members get unlimited generations, an AI party planner, printable party packs, RSVP invites, and a public gallery.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Free AI birthday cake generator with name personalization.
- [Free AI Cake Designer](/free-ai-cake-designer): Main designer flow — pick occasion, name and theme.
- [AI Cake Generator (Free)](/ai-cake-generator-free): Landing page for the free AI cake generator.
- [AI Birthday Cake With Name](/ai-birthday-cake-with-name): Personalized birthday cakes featuring any name.
- [Photo Cake Maker](/photo-cake-maker): Upload a photo and place it on a top-down cake.
- [Personalized Cake Online](/personalized-cake-online): Custom cakes for any occasion.
- [Wedding Cake Designer](/wedding-cake-designer): AI-designed wedding cakes.
- [Eid Cake Designer](/eid-cake-designer): Cakes for Eid celebrations.
- [Graduation Cake Designer](/graduation-cake-designer): Graduation cake designs.
- [3D Cake Designer](/3d-cake-designer): 3D-style cake renders.
- [Party Planner](/party-planner): Free AI party planner — tasks, guests, invites, RSVP.
- [Recipes](/recipes): Cake recipes with ingredients and instructions.
- [Community Gallery](/community): Cakes shared by other users.
- [Blog](/blog): Articles on cake design, party planning and celebration ideas.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Plans and pricing.
- [How It Works](/how-it-works): 3-step overview of the cake designer.
- [Use Cases](/use-cases): Occasions and use cases supported.
- [FAQ](/faq): Frequently asked questions.
- [About](/about): About Cake AI Artist.
- [Contact](/contact): Contact and support.
